ab: Ljumeg, i tjumaq sun?
en: ljumeg, are you home?

ab: ui i tjumaq aken, saumaqanu a ’irimu.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Ljumeg, i tjumaq sun?
en: ljumeg, are you home?

ab: neka ti Ljumeg i tjumaq! ti Vais aken, kemuda aya sun? ku qivuav anga ti Ljumeg nu mangtjez i tjumaq.
ch: B:Ljumeg不在家耶!我是Vais，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Ljumeg。
en: Ljumeg  is not at home. I am Vais. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: a tima mun?
en: Who are you?

ab: vuvu, ti Ljumeg kati Vais amen, pai suqeljevi a paljing!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Ljumeg和Vais，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Ljumeg and Vais, please open the door for us.

ab: tima?
en: Who is it?

ab: ti Vais aken, kemikim aken tjai Kuljelje.
en: I am Vais, I am here for Kuljelje.

ab: vuvu, mangtjez aken a kivala tjanusun.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: sicuayan anga su pinangtjezan, nasengelit anga ken tjanusun.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Vais, ari vaiki a kivangavang.
en: Vais, I am here to play with you.

ab: saumaqanu a kirimu, cuayanga ken a kiljaljavaljava tjanusun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: avan cu a ku sinitalem a vurati, paqayamu a keman pai!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: avan cu a qaljemeqem a vurati.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: idu! paqayamu a keman tua ku sinitalem a kudamunu.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: qaljemaqem aravac ca kudamunu.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: qiladju! paqayamu a keman tuca ku sinitalem a puday!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: uwa! avancu a qaljemaqem a puday.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: a keman sun tuca tjianes?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: inika ken a maqati a keman tua tjianes, avan a pingku a keman aken.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: a keman sun tua piyapiya?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ui, tjengelay aken a keman tua piyapiya.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: ku sitjuljaan sun tua kudamunu tua su kanen.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: masalu, avancu a puqetim a kudamunu.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: ku sialapan sun tua zaljum tua su tekelen.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: masalu.
en: Thank you.

ab: suliavu a keman, napakaliav aken a seman djamay.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: u! salum sasanguaq angata.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: suliavu a keman, liav anan a kinsa imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: saka inika ken na uri malumalj!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: suliavu a keman, liav anan a imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: nasemuliav anga ken, inika ken a maqati anga patjaizua a keman.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
